name: Arthur Hamilton
abstract: Arthur Hamilton Stern (October 22, 1926 – May 20, 2025) was an American songwriter. He is best known for the song "Cry Me a River", first published in 1953 and recorded by Julie London and numerous other artists.

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: I sent it to Arthur Hamilton and it became, “I Never Told You.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
